title: Validation error mapping

commands.summary: Final S13 closeout gate rerun after evidence creation

commands.command: claude -p --add-dir /tmp --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --no-session-persistence --tools Read --disallowedTools Bash,Edit,Write,MultiEdit,NotebookEdit,Grep,Glob --output-format json
commands.summary: Single valid read-only S13 Claude review completed against /tmp/lfos-rp00-p02-m04-s13-review-packet.diff.

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

All commands are local validation, parser, test, Claude read-only review, or git whitespace checks; none execute service logic, create runtime routes, invoke Claude runtime review, write review queues, write review assignments, send review notifications, replace human approval, evaluate runtime permission, call an AuthZ evaluator, run a permission engine, append audit ledgers, write audit events, persist idempotency records, write idempotency stores, acquire locks, persist lock records, write lock stores, create UI, write databases, write storage, write persistence records, write error records, map runtime errors, translate runtime exceptions, or persist product state.
Pre-closeout npm run rp00:control-plane:validate failed only because S13 evidence files were intentionally not created yet; this command is rerun after evidence creation as the final gate.

Claude C00 valid review completed once using claude-opus-4-8 effort=max read-only packet review. Claude rated the S13 implementation PASS/GO with no P0/P1 findings. The single P2 stale human_approval evidence descriptor was fixed before final production_ready. The P3 fixture casing note is deferred as cosmetic and non-blocking.

evidence_summary.claude_review_dependency: C00 actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only review required before production_ready
evidence_summary.human_approval_boundary: Human approval is not replaced or synthesized by this deterministic synthetic Validation error mapping path because no sensitive production mutation, client-facing output, external sharing, finance action, real data operation, runtime execution, permission engine execution, AuthZ evaluation, audit write, idempotency store write, lock acquisition, lock store write, persistence record write, error record write, runtime error mapping, exception translation, storage write, database write, UI creation, or product-state write occurs.
evidence_summary.validation_error_mapping_boundary: S13 prechecks the S12 Persistence boundary result as metadata only, emits canonical validation-error-mapping metadata, fails closed on unsafe runtime error mapping, exception translation, error-record, persistence, database, storage, UI, audit, AuthZ, permission, review-queue, and runtime Claude claims, keeps RP00.P02.M04 open, and hands off to RP00.P02.M04.S14.
